name: INSPIRE HEP API
description: INSPIRE is a trusted community hub that helps researchers in high energy physics and related fields to share and find accurate scholarly information on literature, authors, institutions, conferences, journals, jobs, experiments, seminars, and data. Rate limited to 15 requests per 5 seconds per IP.
